meta.title: EnergieMIND — AI-Powered Energy Intelligence
meta.description: EnergieMIND connects energy systems, mining heat recovery, AI optimization and sustainable infrastructure into one intelligent energy layer.

hero.headline: EnergieMIND
hero.subheadline: AI-powered energy intelligence for mining heat utility, sustainable infrastructure and future energy networks.
hero.supporting: Energy Intelligence · Mining Heat Recovery · AI Optimization · Sustainable Infrastructure · ENM Utility Layer

mission.title: Mission
mission.subtitle: Connecting energy, mining, AI and sustainability
mission.description: EnergieMIND connects energy systems, mining systems, AI coordination and sustainability into one intelligent energy infrastructure concept. We are developing the coordination layer where computational energy, recovered heat and infrastructure intelligence work together.
mission.pageIntro: EnergieMIND is designed to transform how energy and mining systems interact — turning wasted computational energy into useful heat, intelligence and sustainable infrastructure value.
mission.visionText: A future where every joule of computational energy is intelligently coordinated — producing hash power, recoverable heat, operational data and optimization opportunities for buildings, farms and energy networks.
mission.approachText: We combine energy monitoring, AI-assisted optimization, mining heat recovery and sustainable infrastructure design into a unified energy intelligence platform — currently in development and pilot preparation.

problem.title: The Problem
problem.subtitle: Energy systems lack coordination and intelligence

items.wastedEnergy: Energy is wasted across generation, distribution and consumption.
items.wastedHeat: Mining heat is wasted while commercial buildings need heating.
items.noIntelligence: Energy systems lack real-time intelligence and coordination.
items.infrastructure: Infrastructure needs better coordination between energy, heat and compute.

thesis.title: The EnergieMIND Thesis
thesis.subtitle: Computational energy should not be wasted
thesis.description: Mining machines can produce more than hash power. EnergieMIND is designed to capture and coordinate the full value chain of computational energy infrastructure.

outputs.heat: Recoverable heat for buildings and facilities

pillars.title: Core Pillars
pillars.subtitle: Five interconnected layers of energy intelligence

energyIntelligence.title: Energy Intelligence
energyIntelligence.description: AI-assisted monitoring, analysis and optimization of energy flows across mining, heating and infrastructure systems.

miningHeatUtility.title: Mining Heat Utility
miningHeatUtility.description: Using mining heat for homes, hotels, farms and commercial facilities — turning computational byproduct into useful thermal energy.

energyDashboard.title: Energy Dashboard
energyDashboard.description: Monitoring energy consumption, miner output, heat recovery rates and operational performance in one unified view.

sustainableInfrastructure.title: Sustainable Infrastructure
sustainableInfrastructure.description: Connecting renewable energy, mining operations, heating systems and energy efficiency into coordinated infrastructure.

enmUtilityLayer.title: ENM Utility Layer
enmUtilityLayer.description: Future tokenized coordination layer for ecosystem utility — enabling participation in the EnergieMIND energy network.

pilot.title: Pilot Program
pilot.subtitle: Designed for future commercial pilots
pilot.description: EnergieMIND is preparing pilot opportunities across diverse facility types. We are developing solutions for organizations interested in mining heat utility and energy intelligence.
pilot.pageIntro: EnergieMIND is in pilot preparation phase. We are designing deployment models for facilities that can benefit from mining heat recovery, energy intelligence and AI-assisted optimization.

ecosystem.title: Ecosystem
ecosystem.subtitle: Part of the TVK / EnteleKRON ecosystem
ecosystem.description: EnergieMIND is the energy intelligence and sustainable infrastructure layer within a broader ecosystem of trust, AI and infrastructure.
ecosystem.pageIntro: EnergieMIND operates as the energy intelligence layer within the TVK / EnteleKRON ecosystem — connecting infrastructure, AI, trust and utility coordination.

enm.title: ENM Token
enm.subtitle: Utility layer for the EnergieMIND ecosystem
enm.description: ENM is the Ethereum ERC-20 token prepared for the EnergieMIND layer. It is designed as a utility coordination token within the ecosystem — not as an investment product.
enm.riskText: ENM is a utility token within the EnergieMIND ecosystem. It is not an investment product. Token values may fluctuate. No returns are promised. Participate only after understanding the risks. Full token and presale details are available at enm.network.
enm.pageIntro: ENM serves as the utility token layer for the EnergieMIND ecosystem. For complete token details, presale information and documentation, visit enm.network.
enm.utilityText: ENM is designed for ecosystem utility coordination — enabling participation in the EnergieMIND energy intelligence network. It is not presented as an investment vehicle.
enm.disclaimerText: This page provides basic contract information only. EnergieMIND.com focuses on the energy intelligence project. All detailed token information, presale details and risk disclosures are maintained at enm.network.

roadmap.title: Roadmap
roadmap.subtitle: Development milestones
roadmap.pageIntro: EnergieMIND development follows a phased approach — from concept and architecture through pilot preparation and future deployment.

phase1.title: Phase 1 — Concept & Architecture
phase1.items: Energy intelligence concept development, ecosystem architecture design, mining heat utility research

phase2.title: Phase 2 — Technology Development
phase2.items: Energy dashboard development, AI optimization modules, heat recovery system design

phase3.title: Phase 3 — Pilot Preparation
phase3.items: Pilot site identification, facility assessment, deployment model design

phase4.title: Phase 4 — Commercial Pilots
phase4.items: Hotel, commercial building and agricultural facility pilots, performance validation

phase5.title: Phase 5 — Network Expansion
phase5.items: Multi-site coordination, ENM utility layer activation, ecosystem integration

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Get in touch with EnergieMIND
contact.pageIntro: Interested in pilot opportunities, partnerships or learning more about EnergieMIND? We welcome inquiries from organizations exploring energy intelligence and mining heat utility.
contact.pilotText: For organizations interested in future pilot deployments of mining heat utility and energy intelligence systems.
contact.partnershipText: For infrastructure partners, energy companies and technology integrators within the ecosystem.
contact.generalText: For general questions about EnergieMIND, the ecosystem or technology development.
contact.tokenNote: For ENM token-specific inquiries, please visit enm.network

energyIntelligence.pageIntro: AI-assisted monitoring and optimization of energy flows — designed to bring intelligence to mining, heating and infrastructure systems.
energyIntelligence.section1Text: EnergieMIND is developing dashboards and monitoring systems that track energy consumption, production and optimization opportunities across connected infrastructure.
energyIntelligence.section2Text: Machine learning models designed to analyze energy patterns, predict demand and optimize operational schedules for mining and heating systems.
energyIntelligence.section3Text: Connecting renewable energy sources, mining operations and heating demand into a coordinated energy intelligence network.

miningHeatUtility.pageIntro: Transforming computational byproduct into useful thermal energy for buildings, farms and commercial facilities.
miningHeatUtility.section1Text: Mining hardware generates significant thermal output. EnergieMIND is designed to capture this heat and redirect it to facilities that need heating — hotels, greenhouses, commercial buildings and agricultural operations.
miningHeatUtility.section2Text: Instead of treating heat as waste, mining operations can produce both computational output and useful thermal energy — improving overall energy efficiency.
miningHeatUtility.section3Text: Heat recovery systems designed for integration with existing HVAC infrastructure, enabling mining heat utility without major facility modifications.

technology.pageIntro: The technical foundation of EnergieMIND — energy dashboards, AI optimization, heat recovery systems and infrastructure coordination.
technology.section1Text: A unified monitoring platform designed to track energy flows, miner performance, heat recovery rates and system health across connected infrastructure.
technology.section2Text: Machine learning modules for energy pattern analysis, demand forecasting and operational schedule optimization across mining and heating systems.
technology.section3Text: Engineering designs for capturing and distributing mining heat to connected facilities — from direct air heating to water-based heat exchange systems.
technology.section4Text: Integration interfaces designed for connecting renewable energy systems, mining hardware, heating infrastructure and the ENM utility layer.

footer.tagline: AI-powered energy intelligence for sustainable infrastructure.
footer.legal: EnergieMIND is a developing energy intelligence project. No investment returns are promised. ENM token details are maintained at enm.network.
